record.field:
Dear Project Manager,

A new task has been submitted for your review:

  • Project: {{ object.project_id.name }}
  • Member: {{ object.member_id.name }}
  • Date: {{ object.date }}
  • Description: {{ object.description[:100] }}
  • Time: {{ '%02d:%02d'|format(object.time_from|int, ((object.time_from - object.time_from|int) * 60)|int) }} - {{ '%02d:%02d'|format(object.time_to|int, ((object.time_to - object.time_to|int) * 60)|int) }}

Please review and approve or reject this task.

Dear {{ object.member_id.name }},

Your task status has been updated:

  • Project: {{ object.project_id.name }}
  • Date: {{ object.date }}
  • Description: {{ object.description[:100] }}
  • Status: {{ object.approval_status }}
    • {% if object.manager_comment %}
  • Manager Comment: {{ object.manager_comment }}
    • {% endif %}

Warning: Project deadline reached!

  • Project: {{ object.name }}
  • Expected End Date: {{ object.expected_end_date }}
  • Pending Tasks: {{ object.pending_task_count }}
  • Progress: {{ '%.1f'|format(object.progress_percentage) }}%

Please review and take appropriate action.
